list.vod_blurb: A bright-eyed freshman's decision to room with a popular student leads to what starts as an exci
list.vod_content: A bright-eyed freshman's decision to room with a popular student leads to what starts as an exciting new friendship but gradually transforms into a subtle battle of wills.
